# Pastoralist

> Pastoralist audits, secures, and cleans up package manager overrides for npm, pnpm, Yarn, and Bun.

Pastoralist records why each override exists, which packages still need it, and when it can be removed. It also supports security scans, patch tracking, monorepos, JSON output, and GitHub Actions.

## Start Here

- [Documentation home](https://jeffry.in/pastoralist/): Product overview, demos, and install path.
- [GitHub repository](https://github.com/yowainwright/pastoralist): Source code, issues, releases, and GitHub Action.
- [npm package](https://www.npmjs.com/package/pastoralist): Published CLI package.
- [Full LLM context](https://jeffry.in/pastoralist/llms-full.txt): Concatenated Markdown documentation for agents.

## Common Commands

```bash
npm install pastoralist --save-dev
npx pastoralist doctor
npx pastoralist --summary --dry-run
npx pastoralist --checkSecurity --securityProvider osv
npx pastoralist --remove-unused
npx pastoralist --setup-hook
```

## Documentation

- [Introduction to Pastoralist](https://jeffry.in/pastoralist/docs/introduction): Pastoralist keeps dependency overrides explainable, current, and removable
- [Setup](https://jeffry.in/pastoralist/docs/setup): Install Pastoralist and keep your override appendix current
- [Security Vulnerability Detection](https://jeffry.in/pastoralist/docs/security): Detect and fix security vulnerabilities in your dependencies
- [Workspaces & Monorepos](https://jeffry.in/pastoralist/docs/workspaces): Using pastoralist in workspace and monorepo environments
- [Advanced Features](https://jeffry.in/pastoralist/docs/advanced-features): Deep dive into pastoralist's advanced capabilities
- [Interactive Tutorial](https://jeffry.in/pastoralist/docs/codelab): Learn pastoralist step-by-step
- [API Reference](https://jeffry.in/pastoralist/docs/api-reference): Complete reference for pastoralist CLI and Node.js API
- [Architecture](https://jeffry.in/pastoralist/docs/architecture): Deep dive into how Pastoralist works, including overrides, resolutions, patches, and the object anatomy
- [Troubleshooting & FAQ](https://jeffry.in/pastoralist/docs/troubleshooting): Common issues and frequently asked questions
- [Configuration](https://jeffry.in/pastoralist/docs/configuration): Learn how to configure Pastoralist using config files or package.json
- [GitHub Action](https://jeffry.in/pastoralist/docs/github-action): Automated dependency override management for CI/CD
